name: sound_quality
description: The audio performance and clarity of the device.
examples: The sound goes out after a week

name: charging_ease
description: The convenience and reliability of the charging process.
examples: right AirPod doesn’t charge at all

name: battery_life
description: The duration the device holds a charge.
examples: when it does it does within 20 minutes

name: volume_limit
description: The maximum loudness capability of the device.
examples: turn the volume up a bit more
You can't play music too loud

name: functionality
description: The general operational performance and features.

name: aesthetics
description: The visual appearance and design of the product.

name: general_satisfaction
description: Overall positive sentiment or enjoyment of the product.

name: daily_usage
description: Frequency and consistency of product use.
examples: I use AirPods for practically all my personal and business calls

name: connection_stability
description: Reliability of the wireless link to the device.
examples: AirPods (gen 1) used to lose connection to the iPhone during the calls
hold the connection to the iPhone more reliably

name: wireless_capability
examples: I like the ear buds because of the wireless capability

name: noise_cancellation
examples: Noise cancellation not as what is described

name: comfort
description: The physical ease and ergonomics of wearing the device.
examples: they are the ONLY over-ear headphones I can wear all day

name: device_integration
description: How seamlessly the product connects and works with other devices.
examples: integrate as flawlessly with my Apple devices

name: build_quality
description: The construction quality, materials, and durability of the hardware.

name: convenience
description: The ease of use and practicality in daily situations.

name: replaceable_parts
description: The availability of modular or consumable components that can be swapped.
